fetch_path_injection.description: Client-side path traversal via fetch/XHR -- manipulate URL path segments that client-side code uses to construct API requests

probes.description: URL-encoded path traversal in API fetch -- client-side code appends user input to API base URL, traversal reaches different endpoint
Deep path traversal via client-side fetch -- triple traversal to reach unintended server paths
Double-encoded dot-dot-slash -- bypass client-side path validation that checks for literal ../

router_manipulation.description: Client-side router manipulation -- abuse SPA routing to force client to load attacker-controlled state or fetch different API responses

probes.description: Router path traversal -- SPA router passes path to API client which constructs fetch URL with traversal
Traversal to API documentation -- access Swagger/OpenAPI spec via path traversal in client routing

postmessage_cspt.description: CSPT via postMessage -- attacker page sends crafted path via postMessage, victim page uses it in fetch/XHR

probes.description: Check for postMessage listeners that use message data in URL construction -- look for addEventListener('message') handlers fetching dynamic URLs
